log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Locathah — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Locathah — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Locathah — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 16 damage. Locathah — Armored Tank HP: 43/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Locathah — Armored Tank --- HP: 43/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Locathah — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Locathah — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Locathah — Armored Tank HP: 23/59
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Locathah — Armored Tank HP: 10/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Locathah — Armored Tank --- HP: 10/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (10/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Locathah — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Locathah — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Locathah — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Locathah — Armored Tank HP: -7/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+4=21 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
